hero.title: Animal Nutrition
hero.subtitle: Optimizing Health and Performance in Animal Nutrition.

animal-nutrition.description: In animal nutrition, chemistry meets biology. Our high-purity amino acids and functional ingredients are engineered for optimal absorption, bioavailability, and metabolic efficiency, providing the essential building blocks for healthy growth and productivity.

enhanced_bioavailability.title: Enhanced Bioavailability
enhanced_bioavailability.text: We control for molecular integrity and solubility to ensure animals receive the intended nutritional benefit consistently.

guaranteed_stability.title: Guaranteed Stability
guaranteed_stability.text: Our ingredients are designed for chemical stability during feed storage, processing, and digestion.

efficient_production.title: Efficient Production
efficient_production.text: Our sustainable manufacturing processes reduce waste and energy use while ensuring product safety and performance.

avigly_hp.subtitle: Glycine USP
avigly_hp.desc: A foundational amino acid for metabolic processes.

avitau.subtitle: Taurine
avitau.desc: A key functional additive for health and development.

food-and-beverages.description: In the food and beverage industry, ingredients must be functional, safe, and reliable in diverse and often complex formulations. Our products are engineered to perform predictably under thermal and chemical stress, helping global manufacturers balance taste, preservation, and nutritional integrity.

consistent_performance.title: Consistent Performance
consistent_performance.text: Our ingredients act as precise reagents to control pH, enhance flavor, and ensure textural stability in large-scale production.

assured_food_safety.title: Assured Food Safety
assured_food_safety.text: Manufactured in our FSSC 22000 certified facility, our products meet international safety and quality standards.

sustainable_sourcing.title: Sustainable Sourcing
sustainable_sourcing.text: We are committed to responsible manufacturing, helping you create products that are better for consumers and the planet.

avivan.desc: A high-purity aromatic for consistent, high-impact flavor profiles.

avigly_hp.subtitle: Glycine USP
avigly_hp.desc: Food-grade amino acid for flavor enhancement and nutritional fortification.

avitau.subtitle: Taurine
avitau.desc: Food-grade amino acid for nutritional fortification in energy beverages and functional food applications.

hero.title: Industrial & Specialty Applications
hero.subtitle: Reliable Chemistry for Demanding Industrial Processes.

industrial-and-specialty-applications.description: Industrial applications demand molecules that perform predictably under high-stress conditions. Our technical-grade ingredients are optimized for controlled reactivity and process compatibility, acting as reliable reagents that catalyze efficiency and improve overall process yield.

predictable_reactivity.title: Predictable Reactivity
predictable_reactivity.text: Our products are engineered for consistent performance, reducing side reactions and enhancing production reliability.

process_compatibility.title: Process Compatibility
process_compatibility.text: We ensure our ingredients are stable and compatible with a wide range of industrial systems and processes.

sustainable_manufacturing.title: Sustainable Manufacturing
sustainable_manufacturing.text: Our energy-efficient processes, solvent recovery systems, and minimized waste streams support your environmental compliance goals.

aviga_bio_t.subtitle:
Glycolic Acid 70% Technical Grade
Bio-Based
aviga_bio_t.desc: A bio-based versatile acid for cleaning, descaling, and chemical synthesis.

aviga_t.subtitle: Glycolic Acid 70% Technical Grade
aviga_t.desc: A versatile acid for cleaning, descaling, and chemical synthesis.

mehq.desc: A high-purity polymerization inhibitor for process control.

chlorhexidine.subtitle: Base
chlorhexidine.desc: A specialty intermediate for high-performance applications.

personal-care-and-cosmetics.description: In personal care, molecules interact directly with skin, hair, and formulations. Our Glycolic Acids, Amino Acids, and specialty intermediates are designed for controlled activity, predictable reactivity, and long-term stability in complex cosmetic matrices. We treat each formulation as a micro-laboratory, carefully balancing pH, solubility, and compatibility to ensure efficacy, safety, and sensory performance.

controlled_activity.title: Controlled Activity
controlled_activity.text: We engineer our molecules for predictable reactivity, ensuring consistent performance in anti-aging serums, exfoliating peels, and other active formulations.

formulation_stability.title: Formulation Stability
formulation_stability.text: Our ingredients are designed for long-term stability in complex cosmetic matrices, balancing pH, solubility, and compatibility to protect your product's integrity.

uncompromising_purity.title: Uncompromising Purity
uncompromising_purity.text: We deliver ingredients that meet the highest standards for skin safety, giving you and your customers complete confidence.

aviga_bio_hp.subtitle: Glycolic Acid 70% Cosmetic Grade Bio-Based
aviga_bio_hp.desc: Manufactured from bio-based origins for uncompromising cosmetic purity.

aviga_hp.subtitle: Glycolic Acid 70% Cosmetic Grade
aviga_hp.desc: The industry benchmark for high-purity exfoliation and rejuvenation.

chlorhexidine_base.subtitle: Base
chlorhexidine_base.desc: A high-purity antimicrobial base for personal care preservative systems.

avigly_hp.subtitle: Glycine USP
avigly_hp.desc: High-purity amino acid for skin conditioning, pH buffering, and formulation stabilization in cosmetic systems.

avitau.subtitle: Taurine
avitau.desc: Antioxidant amino acid for anti-aging and protective skincare formulations.

avivan.desc: High-purity aromatic compound providing characteristic vanilla fragrance.

hero.title: Pharmaceuticals
hero.subtitle: Purity and Compliance for Pharmaceutical Innovation.

pharmaceuticals.description: The pharmaceutical market demands the highest standards of purity, reproducibility, and regulatory compliance. Our ingredients are manufactured in a certified environment to serve as reliable building blocks for APIs, excipients, and nutraceuticals, supported by comprehensive documentation to ensure a smooth path to market.

stringent_quality_standards.title: Stringent Quality Standards
stringent_quality_standards.text: We manufacture ingredients designed to meet stringent USP and other global pharmacopeia standards.

formulation_stability.title: Formulation Stability
formulation_stability.text: Our processes ensure the precise molecular composition required for predictable therapeutic outcomes and bioavailability.

uncompromising_purity.title: Uncompromising Purity
uncompromising_purity.text: We provide ingredients and documentation that give our partners confidence for distribution across international healthcare markets.

avigly_hp.subtitle: Glycine USP
avigly_hp.desc: High-purity, USP-grade Glycine for APIs and critical formulations.

avitau.subtitle: Taurine
avitau.desc: A stable, high-purity amino acid for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical applications.

chlorhexidine_base.subtitle: Base
chlorhexidine_base.desc: A high-purity intermediate for active ingredient synthesis.

guaiacol.desc: A versatile intermediate for pharmaceutical synthesis.

mehq.desc: Pharmaceutical-grade intermediate for API synthesis and antioxidant drug development.
